_meta.description: Static boilerplate content for DS listing documents. These sections are identical across ALL horse listings.

why_tokenise_body: Tokinvest brings the excitement of racehorse ownership to everyone. Through tokenisation, investors can own a share of a racehorse, participate in its racing journey, and earn a share of any prize money — all without the traditional barriers to entry. Each token represents a fractional interest in the horse's lease, giving you a real stake in the action. Whether you're a seasoned racing enthusiast or a first-time investor, Tokinvest makes it simple, transparent, and rewarding.
intro_template: {horseName}: Evolution Stables' next offering on Tokinvest — a digital syndication platform that allows everyday investors to own a fractional share in a racehorse. Through tokenisation, {horseName} becomes accessible to a new generation of racing enthusiasts and investors, combining the thrill of the track with the transparency of blockchain technology.
earnings_language: Token holders are entitled to 75% of net prize money earned by the horse during the lease period, distributed pro-rata on a quarterly basis.
pedigree_intro_body: A thoroughbred is only as strong as the bloodlines behind it. {horseName}'s pedigree reflects a deliberate breeding strategy, combining proven sire power with a quality dam family.
